summary: Iteration 41 - Purchasing Hub & AI Event Brief Generator PASSED. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend panels verified: Purchasing Hub with 6 tabs (Dashboard, Vendors, POs, Receiving, Invoice OCR, GL Codes) and Event Brief Generator with full form and 2 tabs. Invoice OCR confirmed removed from standalone sidebar and integrated into P&R.

integration_issues.issue: Intermittent 'Failed to fetch dynamically imported module' errors on first load after frontend restart - resolves on retry
integration_issues.note: Likely Vite HMR caching issue, works after page refresh

critical_code_review_comments: Purchasing Hub correctly consolidates vendors, POs, receiving, GL codes, and invoice scans into unified module
Event Brief Generator uses GPT-4.1-mini via Emergent LLM Key with deterministic fallback
Invoice OCR successfully moved from standalone sidebar into Purchasing Hub as a tab
All MongoDB collections properly queried with _id exclusion
Frontend uses proper data-testid attributes for all tabs and content sections
seed_data_creation: Purchasing Hub auto-seeds 6 vendors, 8 POs, 12 GL codes on first access. Test created: TEST_Vendor_Iter41, TEST_Johnson Corp brief, TEST_CRUD_Client brief.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 41 verified Purchasing Hub restructure and AI Event Brief Generator. Backend: /api/purchasing/* (dashboard, vendors, orders, receive, receiving-log, gl-codes, invoice-scans), /api/event-brief/* (generate, briefs, briefs/{id}), /api/invoice-ocr/* (scan, match-po). Frontend: Purchasing Hub panel has data-testid='purchasing-hub-panel' with tabs pr-tab-dashboard, pr-tab-vendors, pr-tab-orders, pr-tab-receiving, pr-tab-invoice-ocr, pr-tab-gl-codes. Event Brief panel has data-testid='event-brief-panel' with tabs brief-tab-generate, brief-tab-briefs. Invoice OCR is NO LONGER a standalone sidebar item - it's integrated as a tab within Purchasing Hub.

purchasing_dashboard.has_kpis: PASS - active_vendors, open_purchase_orders, deliveries_today, invoice_scans, gl_codes, ytd_spend

purchasing_gl_codes.has_categories: PASS - COGS, Labor, Expense, Overhead, Marketing, Maintenance

event_brief_generate.has_beo_structure: PASS - room, timeline, menu, staffing, cost

purchasing_hub_panel.dashboard_tab: PASS - KPIs: 7 vendors, 2 open POs, 1 delivery, 1 scan, 13 GL codes, $1019K YTD
purchasing_hub_panel.vendors_tab: PASS - 7 vendors with categories, GL codes, ratings
purchasing_hub_panel.orders_tab: PASS - POs with statuses and line items

event_brief_panel.generate_tab: PASS - full form with all fields

sidebar_integration.invoice_ocr_standalone_removed: PASS - not in sidebar as standalone item

mocked_apis.note: Event Brief uses real GPT-4.1-mini with deterministic fallback. Purchasing data is seeded demo data.
